executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Run all backend API tests. The Flask server is running on port 5000 in development mode. Test all API endpoints: /api/health, /api/crops, /api/predict, /api/weather, /api/weather/autofill, /api/history, /api/feedback, /api/mandi. Note that the weather API requires an OPENWEATHER_API_KEY which is configured.
